title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to biomass management, biomass resource assessment
management techniques, supply chains. Processing of paddy straw,
densification- Extrusion process, pellets, mills and cubes, Bailing-
classification, uses.

title: Module 2
content:
Residue management for surface mulch and soil incorporation, Paddy Straw
choppers and spreaders as an attachment to combine Harvester, Mulch seeder.

title: Module 3
content:
Paddy Straw Chopper-cum-Loader, Baler for collection of straw; Processing
of straw/ fodder for animal use.

title: Module 4
content:
Agricultural and horticultural use, cushioning material for fruits and
vegetables, Mulching and Composting, Paper and cardboard manufacturing,
Straw as a fuel.
